cards.name: ⅩⅥ The Tower, reversed
cards.interpretation: averting disaster, delaying the inevitable, resisting change

cards.name: 0 The Fool, reversed
cards.interpretation: reckless, careless, distracted, naive, foolish, gullible, stale, dull

cards.name: ⅩⅧ The Moon, reversed
cards.interpretation: fear, deception, anxiety, misunderstanding, misinterpretation, clarity, understanding
